docs: Expand features 36-41 with detailed specifications

Added comprehensive expansions including:
- Feature 37: AMG Flux Potential Analyzer (FBA, LP solver)
- Feature 38: Prophage Integration Site & Excision Risk Explorer
- Feature 39: Periodicity & Wavelet Spectrogram (CWT)
- Feature 40: Epistasis & Fitness Landscape Explorer (Potts models)
- Feature 41: Cocktail Resistance Evolution Simulator (Gillespie)

Each feature includes mathematical foundations, TypeScript implementations,
TUI mockups, and detailed ratings.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
